title: The Children’s People and Nature Survey for England: 2025 update
body: "Waves 9 and 10 of the Children’s People and Nature Survey ran between the 13 to 27 of August 2025 (during the school holidays) and 18 September and 1 October 2025 (during term-time). The survey aims to understand how children and young people aged 8 to 15 in England are engaging with the natural environment inside and outside of school. "
